description: California Consumer Privacy Act protecting consumer data privacy

minor.description: Parent can opt-out of sale/sharing of minor's data (default is opt-in)

right_to_know.description: Consumer can request what data is collected

right_to_delete.description: Consumer can request deletion of personal data

right_to_opt_out.description: Consumer can opt-out of data sale or sharing

right_to_opt_in.description: For minors, parent can authorize data sale

right_to_non_discrimination.description: Cannot discriminate for exercising privacy rights

privacy_policy.description: Must have clear privacy policy listing consumer rights

parental_notice.description: Must notify parents of data collection from minors

opt_out_mechanism.description: Must provide easy mechanism for consumers to opt-out

vendor_contracts.description: Service providers must have data processor agreements

sensitive_personal_information.description: Sensitive data (SSN, health, etc.) highly restricted

profiling.description: Cannot use profiling in way that materially affects educational opportunity

warnings: CCPA applies to for-profit entities collecting CA residents' data
Minors have special protections - parental rights apply
Cannot sell or share minors' data without parental consent (opt-in)
Must provide clear opt-out mechanism for consumers
Have 45 days to respond to consumer rights requests
requirements: Provide clear privacy policy describing data practices
Obtain parental consent before selling minors' data
Respond to consumer requests to know, delete, or opt-out
Limit data retention to what's necessary
Do not discriminate against consumers exercising CCPA rights
